zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Bayern於大約1109年出生在德國貝也明陳阿爾史塔吉勒爾時，她的父親Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen35歲，母親Wulfhilde von Sachsen35歲。她於大約1127年與Diepold IV von Vohburg結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1183年3月16日享年75歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀素爾茲巴-洛森格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bayern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of   Bayer  .

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Bayern was born about 1109, in Altstadt-Lehel, Munich, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, was 35 and her mother, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, was 35. She married Diepold IV von Vohburg about 1127. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 16 March 1183, at the age of 75, and was buried in Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany.

Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Diepold IV von Vohburg environ 1127. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1183, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Bayern(이)가 대략 1109년 독일 베이른 u천 알츠타드트-레헬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Wulfhilde von Sachsen(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1127년 Diepold IV von Vohburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1183년 3월 16일 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 설즈바ch-로즈버그에 묻혔다.

Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Diepold IV von Vohburg aproximadamente 1127. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Bayern родилась около 1109 г. в местности алцтадт-лэел, мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Wulfhilde von Sachsen, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Diepold IV von Vohburg около 1127 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 марта 1183 г. в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия.
